attributes.action: Remove Harmful Pictures From The School Art Curriculum e.g Skulls
attributes.additional_details: Some children especially sensitive ones can tense up to the sight of harmful content and it could cause children not going to their lessons. My son Nathan feels traumatised and does not like the curriculum as he has to constantly draw skulls which could damage his mental health.
attributes.background: I want them to remove harmful content from the art curriculum and for the children to draw normal stuff e.g nature

rejection.details:
We are not sure what you mean by "harmful" pictures or content. You could approach the school to discuss your concerns. You may find the following information helpful: 

https://www.citizensadvice.org.uk/family/education/sorting-out-school-problems/
